## Summary / 修改摘要

<!-- What user, operational, or engineering problem does this PR solve? / 这个 PR 解决什么问题？ -->

## Verification / 验证证据

- [ ] Relevant unit/integration tests / 相关单元或集成测试
- [ ] `npm run docs:check`
- [ ] `npm run quality`
- [ ] Browser desktop/tablet/mobile verification when UI changes / UI 变化时完成三类视口验收
- [ ] Backup/restore or migration evidence when data changes / 数据变化时附迁移或恢复证据

## Security and privacy / 安全与隐私

- [ ] No secrets, production data, customer PII, private uploads, or unlicensed media
- [ ] API/configuration/permission/monitoring/rollback docs updated when affected
- [ ] Chinese and English documentation pairs remain synchronized
